csharpCode: using UnityEngine; public class Script : UnityEditor.Editor { public static string Main() { var all = Object.FindObjectsOfType<Transform>(); var sb = new System.Text.StringBuilder(); foreach (var t in all) { if (t.name.Contains("Dog") || t.name.Contains("dog") || t.name.Contains("900001") || t.name.Contains("900002")) { sb.AppendLine(t.name + " pos=" + t.position); } } return sb.Length > 0 ? sb.ToString() : "No dogs found by name"; } }
